layout.alignment: Mobile-first, optical alignment, left-aligned dense content

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-black/50

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all hover:bg-[#3395FF] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white border border-white/10 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all hover:bg-[#2A2A2A]
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all

inputs.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-md px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#007AFF] focus:border-transparent text-white transition-all w-full

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border-b border-white/10

badges.style: px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-bold tracking-wider uppercase bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/5

motion.list_stagger: staggered entrance for game cards using framer-motion or simple CSS delays

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Follow the exact colors and spacing defined in this JSON. Do not default to Tailwind's slate or Vercel's black/white themes.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid' for the main dashboard and game catalog (gap-6, full utilization of pixels, h-full on children).
Ensure all interactive elements and key text have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
For the header, use a sticky glassmorphism style (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80).
Add 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' to tailwind.config.js font families.
Do not use generic full-screen gradients; use solid dark backgrounds (#0A0A0A) with subtle white/10 borders to create depth.
For hover states, always explicitly define the text color.
For the My Catalog view, ensure image covers don't exceed 80vh on mobile, use grid layouts with card hover animations.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them. Strip standard Shadcn generic looks and apply the 'cards.style' rules.
Use Sonner for toast notifications. Do NOT use HTML input type='date' or <select>—use Shadcn equivalents.
Build a separate View for My Catalog, Add Game flows (Barcode Scanner, RAWG search, Manual), and Gaming Journal.
Ensure mobile barcode scanner UI is fully responsive and full-screen camera view.
